title: Nexus WorldKbRelationshipProjection
description: Canonical wire projection of a World KB relationship row (V1.74; V1.76 adds needs_review + source). One stored row may yield two projections when symmetric=true: the stored direction and a derived symmetric_reverse direction.

symmetric.description: True when the stored row is meant to project in both directions.

source_anchor_ids.description: Grounding source-anchor projection ids (empty for asserted relationships).

needs_review.description: V1.76: true when the edge is an extraction suggestion not yet author-confirmed. The GET graph defaults to excluding needs_review rows; promotion clears the flag.

source.description: V1.76: provenance. 'manual' = author-created via patch route; 'extraction' = proposed by nexus.llm.extract. Read-only.

projection_direction.description: stored = the row's authored direction; symmetric_reverse = derived reverse edge for symmetric rows.
